title: Auto Bridger
description: Automate bridging with a new machine that generates and places cobblestone in any direction
body:
Craft the bridger with 5 cobblestone, a lava and water bucket, one redstone dust, and a piston.

![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CZBBlqna/images/e31d6ab04ae3b1843ba84ee1affbcc2bd67da537.png)

Using the lava and water contained in the bridger, it will generate and place cobblestone in the direction its facing when placed.

The direction is not limited to cardinal; you can place it upwards or downwards, and in water or in lava.

It stops when its chunk gets unloaded, or if there is a block in its way. It will resume when that block is cleared.

![Auto Bridger at work](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CZBBlqna/images/d349d962596740723e0e33b961f00df0bc2471b2.png)

See [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Pepsied)
